arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Los Blancos 'enter the race' for in-demand centre-forward
arts.sum: Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran reportedly emerges as a transfer target for Real Madrid after his excellent start to the 2024-25 campaign.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s possible line-up vs Villarreal today: will Mbappé, Rodrygo start?
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé is poised to return to the Real Madrid line-up against Villarreal this weekend, having staged a rapid recovery from injury . Ancelotti must decide whether to keep Militão in his line-up, or draft in midfielder Aurélien Tchouaméni as a makeshift central-defensive partner for Antonio Rüdiger.

arts.ttl: Saturday's La Liga predictions including Real Madrid vs. Villarreal
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's La Liga fixtures, including Real Madrid vs. Villarreal.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: How Quickly Can Real Madrid Bounce Back?
arts.sum: On this Members-only episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani and Matt Wiltse discuss: Kiyan and Matt discuss big picture Real Madrid: How can Ancelotti turn this around?

arts.ttl: Injured Thibaut Courtois not risked as Real Madrid host Villarreal
arts.sum: Real Madrid goal keeper Thibaut Courtois will not be involved in their weekend La Liga clash with Villarreal. Los Blancos sign off for the October international break with a tie against the Yellow Submarine in the Spanish capital. Courtois has not featured since the 1-1 derby draw at Atletico Madrid and he missed the midweek […] The post Injured Thibaut Courtois not risked as Real Madrid host Villarreal appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid have given Burger King a problem
arts.sum: Real Madrid ’s midweek defeat to Lille in the Champions League is set to lead to a new item on the Burger King menu. The defeat means Los Blancos are now 17th in the league phase of this season’s Champions League and it’s strangely set to result in a new Burger King item.

arts.ttl: Team News: Real Madrid vs. Villarreal injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's La Liga clash between Real Madrid and Villarreal.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for La Liga match against Villarreal
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Saturday’s home match against Villarreal . Can Real Madrid bounce back?

arts.ttl: Real Madrid youngster signs new contract
arts.sum: Real Madrid starlet Joan Martínez has on Friday put pen to paper on a new contract with the club. Youngster Joan, for his part, is of course sidelined long-term at…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Villarreal
arts.sum: Having added Kylian Mbappe to their exceptionally-talented squad ahead of the 2024/25 season, many expected Real Madrid to be invincible this term. Wednesday brought Madrid's first defeat of the campaign as Lille shocked them in the league phase of the Champions League.
